svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 607px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 28px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 54px; margin-left: 617px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #4b5563;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#4b5563, #9da6b2); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: base 相机 RGB-D 观测目标，视觉状态送入 PPO，控制移动底盘与机械臂协同触碰抛来的目标物体

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 172px; margin-left: 738px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #92400e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#92400e, #e49e73); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 130px; margin-left: 183px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. MuJoCo / DcmmVecEnv 环境
包含 tidybot、目标物体、动力学、碰撞、抛球与回合管理

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 263px; margin-left: 183px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2. base 相机获取 RGB-D
render("rgb_array") + render("depth_array")
depth_2_meters() 转成米制深度

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 411px; margin-left: 183px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3. 视觉状态估计
红球检测 -> 深度统计 -> 反投影 -> 3D 跟踪
得到 visual pos3d / visual v_lin_3d

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 550px; margin-left: 183px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4. 构造 PPO 观测 obs
视觉物体状态 + 末端状态 + 底盘状态 + 机械臂状态

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 691px; margin-left: 183px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5. Actor-Critic 决策
RunningMeanStd 标准化后前向推理
输出 actions、values、neglogp、mu、sigma

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 827px; margin-left: 183px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
6. 输出 9 维动作
底盘控制 + 7 关节机械臂 + 夹爪

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 960px; margin-left: 183px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
7. 环境执行动作
DcmmVecEnv.step() / MuJoCo 仿真推进
更新底盘、机械臂和目标物体状态

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1097px; margin-left: 183px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
8. 进入下一时刻
新状态再次被 base 相机观测，形成闭环

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 263px; margin-left: 698px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
9. 计算 reward / done
基于 ee_distance、base_distance、接触关系、成功阈值等

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 409px; margin-left: 758px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 537px; margin-left: 758px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
11. rollout 结束后
计算 GAE advantage 与 return

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 671px; margin-left: 758px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
12. PPO 更新网络
actor loss + critic loss - entropy + bounds loss
backward() -> clip grad -> optimizer.step()

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 243, 199), rgb(39, 30, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 828px; margin-left: 758px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
13. 更新后的策略
进入下一轮采样与交互

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 586px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1204px; margin-left: 361px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
最终目标
让移动底盘与机械臂协同运动，控制夹爪末端触碰抛来的动态目标物体。
